REPLY MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS DEMURRER (TRANSACTION ID # 100055787) FILED BY DEFENDANT SEE'S CANDIES, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-12-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SEE'S CANDIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO ALL SIX CAUSES OF ACTION AND THE CLASS ALLEGATIONS IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-NOTICED AFTER A DECISION ON A PETITION TO COORDINATE THIS CASE WITH THE CASE PENDING IN LOS ANGELES SUPERIOR COURT. TO FOSTER JUDICIAL ECONOMY AND AVOID THE POSSIBILITY OF INCONSISTENT RULINGS, THE COURT EXERCISES ITS INHERENT AUTHORITY TO STAY ALL ACTIVITIES IN THIS CASE PENDING A DECISION ON A PETITION TO COORDINATE. SEE'S IS REQUIRED TO FILE A COORDINATION PETITION WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OR THE STAY WILL BE LIFTED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; (302/HEK)

Off Calendar Dec-07-2018 Continued To Feb-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SEE'S CANDIES, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendant See's Candies, Inc.'s demurrer to all six causes of action and the class allegations in the first amended complaint is off calendar without prejudice to being re-noticed after a decision on a petition to coordinate this case with the case pending in Los Angeles Superior Court. To foster judicial economy and avoid the possibility of inconsistent rulings, the court exercises its inherent authority to stay all activities in this case pending a decision on a petition to coordinate. See's is required to file a coordination petition within thirty days or the stay will be lifted.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; (302/HEK)
